description: No PROP covers preservation of tag input internal state (typed text, suggestion list) across DomainSnapshotReceived events. PROP-TAG-024 covers activeFilterTags preservation and PROP-TAG-033 covers clearing tagAutocompleteVisibleFor on note deletion, but no property verifies that the typed text and autocomplete suggestion state survive a snapshot event when the input remains open. If a DomainSnapshotReceived arrives while the user is typing in an open tag input (tagAutocompleteVisibleFor is non-null), the component's internal text state could be reset by re-render. This is the verification-architecture counterpart to FIND-015.

evidence.snippet:
### PROP-TAG-024 — activeFilterTags preservation across DomainSnapshotReceived
**Maps to**: REQ-TAG-017 (FIND-003 resolution)
**Tier**: 1 (reducer unit test)
**Assertion**: When DomainSnapshotReceived action is dispatched, feedReducer produces a state where activeFilterTags equals the previous state's activeFilterTags
